name: Region Group
analysis: RGN has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 0% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.4× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.3500. Trade idea: entry A$2.4300, stop A$2.1879, target A$3.1563 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
